productName: Honey Stixx - 2Pk - Crystal - Snoops Dream X ATF - Sativa
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Snoop's Dream supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of pine, earthy, and sweet, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
